domain: Catalan castell (UNESCO Intangible Heritage 2010): human tower with 3 structural components — pinya (base ring distributing weight + softening fall), tronc (trunk, up to 9 people per ring level), pom de dalt (top 3 levels of children); folre + manilles added for tallest castells; built in 2 phases — pinya first (foundation forms), then Toc de Castells music signal triggers upper-tronc + pom rapid synchronized rise to minimize weight-strain on lower levels; motto força equilibri valor seny
specific_mechanism: CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE: 2-phase pinya-tronc-pom hierarchical layered attention with collapse-safety. (1) Layer 0 (pinya) = wide K_p-head weight-distributing broadcast ring that receives full input + redistributes to upper layers with high-fanout gradient absorption. (2) Layer 1-N (tronc) = stacked MHA with 9-head-per-layer cap (canonical 9-per-ring castell constraint) and step-locked timing. (3) Layer N+1 (pom de dalt) = 3-head light top with small projection dim d_pom < d_tronc. (4) Inference 2-phase schedule: pinya computes + broadcasts s_pinya first (upper layers gated until pinya coherence-score > τ_p); then upper-tronc + pom proceed in tight wall-clock synchrony (no out-of-phase forward pass; step-locked emit). (5) Drop-detection: per-step monitor upper-tronc coherence C_t = mean cosine across upper-layer activations; if C_t < τ_drop, pinya catches via fallback re-broadcast s_pinya' = boost(s_pinya, dropping-layer-index) to absorb destabilization. (6) Cost-asymmetry: pinya weight-distribution layer trained with higher per-token gradient weight; pom layer trained with lower (mirrors actual castell weight distribution).
llm_application: CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE 2-phase pinya-tronc-pom hierarchical attention + 9-head-per-tronc-layer cap + step-locked synchronous upper rise + drop-detection coherence-fallback re-broadcast + asymmetric gradient weight per layer-tier. Differs from R094 PHYLLOTAXIS (golden-angle head distribution, single-layer). R426 HAKA (synchronized stamp). R472 BAYANIHAN (community lift, no 2-phase). R477 LAUNEDDAS-TRIPLE-LOCK (closest — 1+2 triplet drone, no base-ring weight-broadcast + no 2-phase). R490 BOUZOUKI-TETRACHORD-COUPLE (4-course pair coupling). Differs from Hierarchical Attention literature (no explicit 9-cap castell ring constraint + no collapse-safety + no 2-phase build). Multi-Head Latent Attention (different — KV bottleneck). Coherence Head (single-head function not 2-phase ladder). Differs by 2-PHASE PINYA-BROADCAST + 9-HEAD-PER-LAYER CAP + COLLAPSE-SAFETY RE-BROADCAST + ASYMMETRIC TIER-GRADIENT WEIGHT.
novelty_claim: Hierarchical MHA + phase scheduling + coherence-head + MLA cover layered-attention space. CASTELL-PINYA-TRONC-PHASE-RISE adds (a) 2-phase pinya-then-upper build schedule + (b) 9-head-per-tronc-layer canonical ring cap + (c) drop-detection coherence-fallback re-broadcast + (d) asymmetric tier-gradient weight. Recombination — borderline lookup.
